paragraphs.body: Conclusion about Vyond  As for the task of making videos, I think in the process of creation, depending on AI or not relying on AI has its own advantages. First, let's talk about our feelings about the video that does not rely on AI (vedio1): the video production and editing without artificial intelligence has increased the challenge of our team, because all the beginning is a blank. We must spend a lot of time making templates, characters, scenes, etc.; Take time to match the dialogue and gestures of the characters to the scene. Although the produced video did not take too long, we had to constantly adjust the original script and rewrite the subject matter when we changed some ideas in the middle of the semester, but all of them basically met our requirements for the video we made. Again, rely on artificial intelligence vedio2, the beginning with vidio2 is very convenient and fast! Only two disadvantages: First, if there are not enough text details and requirements, the video effect may be unsatisfactory, and it may contradict the ideas of our team. Second, he may come out with a very different effect than we intended. But other aspects of the function are very comprehensive and excellent, especially for our team, animation production novice Xiaobai, is the most friendly and efficient and helpful tool. Secondly, the animation effect it produced, and its deeper writing and expansion of lines also surprised me. For example, we imagined that it would produce an effect of about 50 seconds but did not expect it to be 1:49. Besides, the connection between content and theme, dialogue and animation was smooth and in line with expectations. It's just a vedio2 that our team refined the text over the course of a week and then kept generating videos. The artificial intelligence that we started out with just conversations didn't work very well. But in our text, we mixed sequence, emotional change, detailed character description, and anticipation of the direction of the lines to produce a work that we were satisfied with. So, I think both have their merits, and this is an innovative and interesting project.

In addition, I particularly hope that there will be more similar extension assignments in the future, because this is not only an assignment that keeps pace with The Times, but also cultivates how to make and express ourselves clearly and present to the audience in a way of communication and teaches us how to make good use of artificial intelligence. As an efficient tool to assist us in learning and future work.
